postings.evidence: Director of Engineering at ResMed. Designing, developing and validating algorithms to predict adverse events using machine learning; developed machine learning algorithms for diagnostic solutions.

postings.evidence: Associate Machine Learning Engineer at Resmed India. Building production-grade GenAI systems, LLM applications, and enterprise RAG platforms; specializing in Multi-Agent Systems and LLMOps.

postings.title: Arash Mehraban
postings.evidence: AI ML Engineer at ResMed. Deep Learning model development on CPU and GPU (CNN, Transformers, PyTorch); AWS SageMaker and Kubernetes deployment.

postings.title: Nadi Sadr
postings.evidence: Advanced Data Scientist at Resmed. Eight years experience in data science and machine learning, developing AI algorithms; previously designed machine learning algorithms and predictive models.

postings.title: Lu Wang
postings.evidence: Advanced data scientist at ResMed. Designing and implementing novel algorithms; using artificial intelligence technology to understand neurological disorders; working on medical genomics and computer vision.

postings.title: Shubhangi Kukreti
postings.evidence: Data Scientist II at Resmed. Strong foundation in machine learning and time-series analysis; developing ML pipelines from data ingestion through modeling; contributing to applied AI initiatives.

postings.title: Arriana D.
postings.evidence: Machine Learning Platform Engineer at Resmed. Developing and deploying machine learning solutions; built NLP classification model; led evaluation of text-to-SQL conversational AI systems using Llama and GPT-4.

postings.title: Viswateja Rayapaneni
postings.evidence: AI ML Architect at ResMed India. 12 years IT experience including Machine Learning and Data Science; leading industry accelerators as Solution and Technical Architect; building E2E analytical data pipelines.

postings.title: Nivedita Singh
postings.evidence: Manager, Software Engineering at Resmed India. Leading Innovation in AI-driven Solutions; Data Scientist with MLE experience; co-invented ML solution; spearheading projects in predictive analytics and intelligent solutions.

postings.evidence: Product Manager - Global Data & AI Platforms at Resmed. Owns end-to-end data product lifecycle; powering AI/ML use cases; launching privacy-compliant data platforms; driving diagnostic insights.
